name: Lemon v. Kurtzman
question: Was it an abuse of a court's discretion to allow payment of allocated funds to nonpublic religious schools, after such allocations were found unconstitutional by the Supreme Court?
description: A case in which the Court ruled that Pennsylvania's Nonpublic Elementary and Secondary Education Act violated the Establishment Clause of the First Amendment when it allowed public school superintendents to reimburse private Catholic schools for the salaries of their teachers.
